original_text:
### Tint Rules
- Campaign headline "D" and "M": **≈40% tint** of the headline color (Gold or Brand Blue colorway).
- Light Blue callout box: **70% tint**.
- Golden Sand callout box: **30% tint**.
- Wave top layers: **70% transparency**.
- No other ad-hoc tints — use palette values or these specified tints only.

relations.note: The exclusivity constraint restricts usage to exactly the tint values bound in tint_specification_binding, forbidding any additional ad-hoc tints.

quotes: Campaign headline "D" and "M": **≈40% tint** of the headline color (Gold or Brand Blue colorway).

rules.intent: Ensure tint treatments across headline letters, callout boxes, and wave graphics remain consistent and predictable.
rules.rule_text: Locked tint values apply to specific elements: campaign headline letters 'D' and 'M' use ~40% tint of the headline color (Gold #ffc60a or Brand Blue #00529b colorway); the Light Blue callout box uses 70% tint (callout.data.fill.opacity); the Golden Sand callout box uses 30% tint (callout.text_heavy.fill.opacity); wave top layers use 70% transparency (wave.top_layer.opacity).

effect.reserved_for: specified tint tokens (40% headline letter tint, 70% light blue callout / wave top layer, 30% golden sand callout) or full palette colors
effect.subject: tint/opacity values

quotes: No other ad-hoc tints — use palette values or these specified tints only.
No other ad-hoc tints — use palette values or these specified tints only.

rules.intent: Prevent uncontrolled proliferation of custom opacity values that would dilute brand color consistency.
rules.rule_text: No ad-hoc tints may be introduced; only the specified tint percentages (≈40% headline letter tint, 70% light blue callout/wave transparency, 30% golden sand callout) or full-strength palette colors are permitted.
